# CTOS Portfolio Roadmap
# 05 — Motion Layer (RMD v2.0)

## Objective

Transform the portfolio from a professional website into a memorable system experience.

Motion must:
- Reinforce architecture thinking
- Explain relationships between systems
- Guide attention
- Improve comprehension
- Strengthen personal branding

Motion must never:
- Distract users
- Reduce performance
- Harm accessibility

---

# Motion Philosophy

Motion Is Information.

Every animation must answer:

Why does this animation exist?

Valid reasons:
- Explain
- Reveal
- Guide
- Connect
- Confirm
- Delight

---

# CTOS Motion Formula

System Thinking
+
Progressive Disclosure
+
Physics-Based Motion
+
Shared Element Transitions
+
Morphing SVG
=
CTOS Motion System

---

# New Motion Principles

## Principle M-01
Clarity Before Complexity

## Principle M-02
Experience Before Animation

## Principle M-03
Architecture Before Decoration

## Principle M-04
Motion Must Explain

## Principle M-05
Performance Is A Feature

---

# Signature Interaction System

## SI-01 — Interactive System Graph Hero

Purpose:
Visualize expertise as a connected system.

Nodes:
- Cloudflare
- Proxmox
- Astro
- Vue
- AI
- Infrastructure

Interactions:
- Hover Glow
- Connection Pulse
- Metadata Reveal
- Relationship Highlight

Rule:
Never show all information immediately.
Use progressive disclosure.

---

## SI-02 — Shared Element Project Expansion

Inspired by premium product experiences.

Flow:

Project Card
↓
Expand
↓
Transform
↓
Case Study Viewer

Rule:
Do not open traditional modals.
User should feel the same object is expanding.

---

## SI-03 — Floating System Dock

Mobile Only.

Items:
- Home
- Projects
- AI Command
- Case Studies
- Notes

Interactions:
- Magnetic Attraction
- Dock Expansion
- SVG Morphing
- Dynamic Resize

---

## SI-04 — Architecture Explorer

Purpose:
Visualize system relationships.

Interactions:
- Node Expansion
- Relationship Reveal
- Animated Graph Connections
- Metadata Layer

---

## SI-05 — Dynamic Certificate Vault

Interactions:
- Folder Open
- Certificate Preview
- Verification Reveal
- Fullscreen Expand

---

## SI-06 — AI Command Center

Trigger:
CTRL + K
CMD + K

Mobile:
Dock Center Action

Purpose:
Primary navigation engine.

---

# Progressive Disclosure System

Users should initially see:
20%

Remaining:
80%

revealed through interaction.

Applications:
- Hero
- Projects
- Certificates
- Architecture Explorer
- Case Studies

---

# Physics Motion System

Hover Effects:
- Magnetic Pull
- Micro Translation
- Dynamic Glow
- Cursor Response

Movement Range:
2px–8px maximum.

Rule:
Objects should feel alive, not floating.

---

# Shared Element Transition Rules

Allowed:
- Project → Case Study
- Certificate → Detail View
- Note → Full Article

Forbidden:
- Every interaction
- Every card

Use only for high-value transitions.

---

# Motion Timing System

Hover: 120ms
Reveal: 180ms
Expand: 250ms
Section: 350ms
Page: 450ms

Rule:
No animation longer than 600ms.

---

# Easing Standards

Default:

cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)

---

# Motion Technology Stack

Primary:
- Motion
- Motion for Vue

Secondary:
- GSAP (Hero & Architecture Explorer only)

Avoid:
- Heavy Lottie usage
- Scroll hijacking
- ThreeJS everywhere

---

# Existing Motion Systems

Maintain:
- Reveal System
- Navigation Motion
- Hero Motion
- SVG Motion
- Cursor System
- Card Interactions
- Scroll Storytelling
- Command Palette Motion
- Certificate Vault Motion
- Visitor Globe Motion

---

# Micro Interaction Inventory

Minimum Target:
50+

Priority Additions:
- Shared Element Expansion
- Architecture Node Hover
- Connection Pulse
- Dock Morphing
- Dock Physics
- Metadata Reveal
- Progressive Disclosure
- SVG State Morphing
- AI Command Activation
- Project Expansion Viewer

---

# Accessibility Rules

Support:
prefers-reduced-motion

Disable:
- Parallax
- SVG Morphing
- Depth Motion
- Heavy Scroll Effects

Keep:
- Fade
- Opacity
- Simple Reveal

---

# Performance Budget

Target FPS: 60fps

Frame Budget: 16ms

INP: <200ms

Lighthouse: 95+

Initial Motion JS Budget:
<150KB

---

# AI Agent Rules

Rule M-01
Motion must support meaning.

Rule M-02
Never animate everything.

Rule M-03
Prioritize readability.

Rule M-04
Use progressive disclosure.

Rule M-05
SVG before Canvas.

Rule M-06
Canvas before ThreeJS.

Rule M-07
Performance before aesthetics.

Rule M-08
Shared Element Transitions are preferred for premium interactions.

---

# Definition of Done

- Motion engine centralized
- Hero graph implemented
- Shared element transitions implemented
- Floating dock implemented
- Architecture explorer implemented
- SVG morphing implemented
- 50+ micro interactions implemented
- Reduced motion supported
- Lighthouse >=95

---

# Next Layer

06-authority-layer.rmd
